Core Gameplay Loop and Win Condition

Factory Balls Forever is a physics-based puzzle game where you control a ball that must navigate through a series of increasingly complex levels. The goal is to get the ball to reach the exit, while avoiding obstacles and enemies that will try to stop you. The game features a variety of levels, each with its own unique challenges and obstacles.

The win condition is simple: get the ball to the exit without touching any of the obstacles or enemies. Sounds easy, but trust us, it's not! The game requires precision timing, spatial reasoning, and a bit of luck to succeed.

As you progress through the levels, the game will introduce new obstacles, enemies, and challenges that will make it increasingly difficult to reach the exit.

Controls and Gameplay

The controls for Factory Balls Forever are simple and intuitive, making it easy to pick up and play. On desktop, you can use your mouse to control the ball, while on mobile, you can use touch controls to navigate the ball through the levels.

The game features a variety of controls, including movement, jump, and spin. You'll need to use these controls strategically to overcome obstacles and enemies.

The game also features a "rewind" feature, which allows you to retry a level if you make a mistake. This feature is especially useful for beginners who are still getting the hang of the game.

Here are a few tips to help you get started with Factory Balls Forever:
